credits.title: What are credits?
credits.description: Credits are used to generate AI-powered portfolio analyses and diagnoses.

landing.heroSubtitle: LUCIUS translates the technical language of the market into clear, unbiased and actionable reading — so you decide intelligently, on your time, in full control.
landing.whyDesc: Most investors accumulate information without understanding what it means. LUCIUS exists to flip that equation.
painPoints: You don't really know what's in your portfolio
You receive too much noise and too little clarity
You make decisions without seeing the whole picture
You hear jargon when you needed plain language

lucidity.label: Clear reading
lucidity.desc: Direct translation of your portfolio into plain language.

lucidity.label: Applied intelligence
lucidity.desc: Cutting-edge AI focused on financial education.

lucidity.label: Decision support
lucidity.desc: Educational suggestions. You make the call.

landing.howDesc: No technical complexity. No jargon. In minutes you'll see your portfolio like never before.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.desc: Quick onboarding. No friction, no credit card.

steps.title: Import your portfolio
steps.desc: CSV, XLSX, OFX or PDF — formats your broker already provides.

steps.title: Receive the diagnosis
steps.desc: Risk, liquidity, concentration and the LUCIUS reading in seconds.

steps.title: Act with clarity
steps.desc: Opportunities, scenario simulations and reports to support decisions.

benefits.title: Performance reading
benefits.desc: See what your portfolio is saying — without needing to be an analyst.

benefits.title: Risk, liquidity and concentration
benefits.desc: Three essential views most investors never see clearly.

benefits.title: Strategic opportunities
benefits.desc: Identification of improvement points — without naming specific assets.

benefits.title: Reports on demand
benefits.desc: Elegant PDFs to record decisions, compare periods and organize your reading.

benefits.title: Chat with LUCIUS
benefits.desc: Ask questions in clear language, with the context of your own portfolio.

benefits.title: Simulations and projections
benefits.desc: Test tactical scenarios before acting — comparative reading, not a promise.

audience: Investors who want to understand what they're doing
Investors tired of jargon and market noise
Investors who want to organize and record decisions
landing.pricingDesc: Total transparency. No fine print, no mandatory commitment.
landing.ctaFinalDesc: Import your portfolio in minutes and discover what it's really telling you.
landing.ctaFinalDisclaimer: LUCIUS is software that supports the analysis of portfolio performance and investor understanding. Informative and educational content — it does not constitute advisory, securities offering or order execution. We are not registered with the CVM, ANBIMA or APIMEC. We do not recommend specific funds, stocks or assets. The final decision is exclusively yours. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

contact.title: Talk to us
contact.intro: Questions, suggestions or support? Send us a message and our team will reply by email at
contact.formDesc: Fill in the fields below. Reply within 2 business days.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject

contact.sentDesc: We received your message. We'll reply soon at sac@luciusinvest.com.br.
contact.errorDesc: Please try again in a moment.

pricing.title: Plans and Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs
pricing.currencyNote: Billed in {{currency}}. Payment processed by Stripe.
pricing.creditsDesc: Each analysis, PDF report or chat with LUCIUS uses 1 credit. Packs never expire and work on any plan (including free).
pricing.trialDaysLeft: {{days}} days left in the free plan
pricing.creditsFooter: One-time payment in {{currency}} processed by Stripe. Credits released automatically after confirmation.

planDescriptions.pro: For those who take it seriously

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your investment portfolio
dashboard.emptyDesc: Import your statements to see the full dashboard with AI analysis.

diagnosis.title: Portfolio performance diagnosis
diagnosis.subtitle: AI-generated analysis based on your investments
diagnosis.overallDesc: Average of risk, diversification and liquidity scores (higher is better)
diagnosis.allocationDesc: How your money is split across investment types
diagnosis.alertsDesc: Investments that may carry disproportionate weight in the portfolio
diagnosis.emptyDesc: Upload your portfolio performance to generate the automatic AI diagnosis.

glossary.risk: Chance of losing money — the higher the more volatile the investment
glossary.diversification: Don't put all your eggs in one basket — spread across investment types
glossary.liquidity: How easily you can turn the investment back into cash when needed

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: PDFs generated from your most recent portfolio diagnosis.
reports.emptyDesc: Click "Generate PDF" to produce the first report from your current diagnosis.
reports.noAnalysisDesc: Import your portfolio and run a diagnosis to enable PDF generation.
reports.acceptedNote: The PDF only includes opportunities you marked as accepted.
reports.paidDesc: Generate professional PDFs branded with LUCIUS, including diagnosis, positions and accepted opportunities.

onboarding.saveError: Error saving profile. Please try again.

objectives.question: What do you want to achieve with your investments?
objectives.subtitle: You can pick more than one option

aposentadoria.label: Comfortable retirement
aposentadoria.desc: Save up to stop working in the future

reserva.label: Emergency reserve
reserva.desc: Have money set aside for the unexpected

investment_horizon.question: When will you need this money?
investment_horizon.subtitle: Think about the main horizon of your investments

longo.label: More than 5 years
longo.desc: I can wait quite a while

liquidity_need.question: How often might you need to withdraw?
liquidity_need.subtitle: Liquidity is how easily you can turn investments into cash

alta.label: Anytime
alta.desc: I need to be able to cash out fast if needed

media.label: Once in a while
media.desc: I can wait a few days or weeks

baixa.label: Almost never
baixa.desc: I don't plan to touch it for a long time

risk_tolerance.question: If your investments dropped 20%, what would you do?
risk_tolerance.subtitle: There's no right answer — it's about how you feel

conservador.label: Pull everything out immediately
conservador.desc: I prefer not to risk it, even if I earn less

moderado.label: Wait a bit
moderado.desc: I'd be worried, but I'd try to wait it out

arrojado.label: Buy more
arrojado.desc: I see drops as an opportunity to buy cheap

monthly_income_range.question: What is your approximate monthly income?
monthly_income_range.subtitle: This helps calibrate the analysis — your data is private

approximate_patrimony.question: How much do you have invested today (approximately)?
approximate_patrimony.subtitle: It can be a guess — no need to be exact

experience_years.question: How long have you been investing?
experience_years.subtitle: Counts any kind of investment, including savings accounts

preference.question: What matters most to you?
preference.subtitle: Pick what fits your moment best

renda.label: Receive monthly income
renda.desc: Dividends, rent, interest — I want money in the bank

crescimento.label: Grow my wealth
crescimento.desc: I can wait, I want to see value go up

protecao.label: Protect what I already have
protecao.desc: I don't want to lose — safety first

simplicidade.label: Keep it simple
simplicidade.desc: I don't want complications — the easier the better

portfolioImport.title: Import portfolio performance
portfolioImport.subtitle: Send your statements and positions for automatic AI analysis
portfolioImport.loadingSubtitle: We're cross-checking the file, period and your investor profile.
portfolioImport.dropDesc: After upload, choose the period and start the portfolio performance analysis
portfolioImport.configDesc: The system will cross the uploaded file with the analyzed period and your investor profile to generate the diagnosis and identify opportunities.
portfolioImport.profileNote: Your investor profile will be used as context to personalize the suggested opportunities.
portfolioImport.completeProfileNote: Before the analysis, complete the investor profile to unlock personalized opportunities.

checks.periodMissing: ❌ Provide a valid period (start date ≤ end date)

toasts.ready: File ready. Configure the period and start the portfolio performance analysis.
toasts.needFile: Upload a file before starting the analysis.
toasts.needOnboarding: Complete your investor profile before running the diagnosis.
toasts.invalidPeriod: Provide a valid period for the analysis.

portfolioImport.privacy: Your data is encrypted and never shared. Used exclusively for the analysis of your portfolio performance.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: All diagnoses run on your portfolio
history.emptyDesc: Import your portfolio and run a diagnosis to start building your history.

chatLucius.headerSubtitle: Support to understand your portfolio performance · Always available
chatLucius.emptyDesc: Ask questions about investments, understand market concepts and get guidance on your portfolio — all in plain language.
chatLucius.footer: Lucius is an educational copilot supporting the understanding of portfolio performance. It does not constitute advisory or order execution.

suggestions.worst: Why is my asset {{ticker}} at {{perf}}%? Should I worry?
suggestions.best: {{ticker}} is up {{perf}}%. Is it time to take profit?
suggestions.concentration: I have {{pct}}% in {{cls}}. Am I too concentrated?
suggestions.lowRisk: My risk score is low. What can I do to improve?
suggestions.lowDiv: How can I better diversify my portfolio?
suggestions.generic2: What are REITs and how to choose them?

recommendations.title: Improvement Opportunities
recommendations.subtitle: Suggested paths to optimize your portfolio performance — you decide what to do.
recommendations.emptyDesc: Send your portfolio performance and run a diagnosis to identify opportunities.
recommendations.paidDesc: Get personalized rebalancing, diversification and optimization suggestions for your portfolio — with step-by-step instructions to apply.
recommendations.ctaDesc: Chat with LUCIUS to understand each suggestion better.

delete.title: Delete {{name}}?
delete.desc: This action is permanent. Removes account, portfolios, analyses and history. Billing records are retained by legal obligation.

paymentSuccess.syncingDesc: Please wait while we sync your subscription. This only takes a few seconds.
paymentSuccess.receivedDesc: Your payment was processed, but syncing is taking a bit longer. Your plan will be activated shortly. You can check on the Plans page.
paymentSuccess.enjoy: You now have access to every feature of the {{plan}} plan. Enjoy the full Lucius experience to manage your investments.

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.privacyDesc: Your data is protected and never used to train AI models. You can export a full copy as JSON or permanently delete your account at any time.
settings.fiscalNote: For tax and accounting obligations, essential billing records are retained for up to 5 years (with no direct link to your identity after deletion).
settings.deleteWarning: This action is permanent. All your personal data, portfolios, analyses, opportunities and reports will be deleted. Billing records are kept by legal obligation and unlinked from your identity.
